title: AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

chunks.text:
[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7645, January 01, 1993 ]

AN ACT APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE OPERATION OF THE GOVERNMENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES FROM JANUARY ONE TO DECEMBER THIRTY-ONE, NINETEEN HUNDRED AND NINETY-THREE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

See GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT (January 1 - December 31, 1993)
